recent_calls.summary: The user called to add important health information and a request for prioritization to their existing work order. The agent confirmed the updates, including the system being turned off for 24 hours, and assured the user that the team would follow up on the next business day. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further requests.

Lauren called in response to a call from Budget to schedule a service for her air conditioner. She clarified that the issue is not an emergency and can be handled during a regular appointment, and she is flexible with the timing. The agent confirmed the details and planned to have the team follow up on the next business day to schedule the service.

Greg Parks called to confirm his recently submitted service claim and requested the earliest available regular cooling service appointment for his air conditioner, which is not working. The AI assistant noted his details and informed him that the team will follow up on the next business day to finalize scheduling. Greg declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Melanie Zellick called to report that her air conditioner is not working, likely due to a failed compressor, and she has elderly people in the home, making it an emergency. The agent documented the issue, flagged it as urgent, and informed Melanie that the team will contact her on the next business day since it is after hours. Melanie confirmed her address and phone number and declined further assistance.

Joshua called to report that a previous repair had failed again and requested immediate assistance due to no air conditioning and having small children in a hot environment. The agent documented the urgent issue and informed Joshua that a representative would contact him on the next business day, Monday after 8 AM. The call ended with the agent confirming the follow-up and no further assistance requested.

The user, Melanie Zellick, called to report an emergency issue with the compressor on her air conditioner. The agent documented the emergency and escalated it for the team to follow up on the next business day. The call ended with the user confirming no further assistance was needed.

The user, Angela Quigley, reported a frozen coil on a new HVAC unit causing the house to be very warm, with a two-day-old baby at home. The agent acknowledged the urgency, escalated the issue as an emergency, and assured a follow-up on the next business day. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further requests.
The call was an inbound after-hours inquiry where the agent, Evie, attempted to assist Angela with heating, cooling, or plumbing services but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could assist the user, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to cancel an appointment and the agent noted the cancellation, informing the user that the team will confirm it on the next business day. The user had no further requests and the call ended politely.

The user reported that their air conditioning unit's outside fan is loud and not spinning and requested urgent service due to the heat. The agent collected the user's contact information and service address, confirmed the details, and assured the user that the team would reach out to schedule the soonest available appointment. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further instructions or issues.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to connect her with a live representative. The call was then successfully transferred to another agent for further assistance.

The user reported that their air conditioning was not working and indicated that it was an emergency requiring immediate service. The agent acknowledged the urgency and transferred the call to a live representative for further assistance.

The user called to schedule a quote for a full replacement and possible upgrade of their central HVAC system. The agent collected the user's details, confirmed availability, and booked an appointment for Monday, July 20th at 8 AM. The user inquired about the dispatch fee, which the agent explained would be reviewed by the team before the appointment.

The user, Shonda, called to set up an appointment for home warranty work through American Home Shield but had trouble completing the process online. The agent gathered information about the user's role as the owner and the type of service needed, though the specific issue was unclear due to unintelligible audio. The call ended with the agent seeking more details about the service request.
The user called to confirm the appointment for Monday and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call.

David Scheller called to schedule an air conditioning repair appointment through American Home Shield. The agent collected all necessary details, including the dispatch number and service preferences, and confirmed the information with David. David declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests, and the call ended successfully with a promise of follow-up contact.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.

The user called to schedule a cooling service for a residential property covered by American Home Shield. The agent gathered necessary information and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Joshua called to report an emergency cooling issue where his blower motor is not working during a heat wave, affecting his small children. The agent collected details, confirmed the emergency, and attempted to transfer the call to a live agent but was unsuccessful. The issue was escalated, and Joshua was informed that an emergency specialist would call him back promptly.

Antonia Pearson called to report an urgent air conditioning issue at her home due to her asthma. The agent collected all necessary details, including service address, contact information, and home warranty dispatch number, and confirmed a technician would contact her soon. Antonia also requested information about home maintenance programs to be sent to her email.
The user called to inquire about an intake form for American Home Shield, but the call ended shortly after the initial exchange without further assistance or resolution.

Amanda called to inquire about options for repairing or replacing her air conditioner, which had a temporary fix but was not cooling properly. The agent confirmed her contact details and scheduled a follow-up for the next day. Amanda declined information about maintenance programs and the call ended after confirming her request.

Michelle Rose called to schedule an air conditioner service appointment due to a suspected Freon leak. She provided her contact details and service address, requested a service for Monday, and declined to provide an email or special instructions. The agent confirmed the details and informed her that the team would reach out to confirm the appointment.

Antonette called to cancel her Monday morning air conditioning appointment and reschedule it for a morning slot on Wednesday, Thursday, or Friday due to her AC producing excess water. The agent confirmed the details, including the service address and callback number, and noted that there was no flooding or electrical risk. Antonette declined information about maintenance programs and was asked for feedback before the call ended.

Antonette called to get an update and schedule service for her air conditioner, which is producing more water than normal. The agent confirmed her service details, including address and contact number, and noted her preference for the next available appointment. Antonette declined additional maintenance program information as she is already enrolled and gave positive feedback about the call experience.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the initial agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to a real agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to a live agent successfully. The call lasted 16 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user, Marquion Williams, called in response to a previous outreach about an in-person interview. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with a specific person named Nicole, and the agent successfully transferred the call to the appropriate live agent.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called to reach Julie but was informed by the agent Sophie that Julie was unavailable. The user requested to leave a message for Julie before the call ended.
Larry called Budget asking to speak with the finance manager. The agent, Sophie, informed him she could not access billing information but transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.
The user called and requested to speak with a representative. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent to assist the user further.

The user called to inquire about why their service technician did not submit a report to their warranty company. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent who could better handle the inquiry.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The agent greeted the user and immediately initiated a transfer to a live agent to assist further. The call was successfully transferred without additional conversation.

The call involved Anna from American Home Shield providing dispatch details for an AC service request for Salila Brimley. The agent confirmed the information and arranged for a callback to discuss the April quote. Anna declined additional maintenance program information and gave positive feedback about the AI assistant.
The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly after the agent's initial greeting without any user response or interaction.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called to speak with someone about an inspection. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call. The call ended shortly after the transfer.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.

The user called Budget and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent attempted to gather the service address ZIP code but transferred the call before completing the information gathering.

Michelle Hanson called to request a quote and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, handled the call professionally and completed the transfer successfully.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent, Sophie, transferred the call to another agent successfully. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to confirm an appointment scheduled for 10 o'clock and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was completed successfully shortly after the user's inquiry.

Rick, a plumbing inspector, called to reschedule a water heater inspection at 8416 Challenge Court due to no answer at the door. The agent offered available time slots for Monday, July 20th, and Rick confirmed the 10 AM appointment. The agent confirmed the rescheduled inspection and assured follow-up from the team.

The user called to confirm if the part for their repair had been ordered. The agent assured the user that the team would be contacted to confirm the order status and that the user would receive a phone call update. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further requests.
